outputs.patch.diff:
--- a/programs/adadas.R
+++ b/programs/adadas.R
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 # ADADAS derivation
 # Bug 1: CHG is inverted (should be AVAL - BASE, not BASE - AVAL)
-# Bug 2: ANL01FL is set for all parameters (should only be for ACTIVE parameters)
+# Bug 2: ANL01FL is set for all parameters (should only be for ACTIVE parameters, i.e., PARAMCD in ("ACTOT", "ACQ1", "ACQ2", "ACQ3", "ACQ4", "ACQ5", "ACQ6", "ACQ7", "ACQ8", "ACQ9", "ACQ10", "ACQ11", "ACQ12", "ACQ13", "ACQ14"))
 # Bug 3: PCHG divides by wrong variable (should divide by BASE, not AVAL)
 
 library(dplyr)
@@ -20,7 +20,7 @@ adadas <- qs %>%
     mutate(
       AVAL = QSSTRESN,
       BASE = if_else(ADY < 1, AVAL, NA_real_),
-      CHG = BASE - AVAL,
+      CHG = AVAL - BASE,
       PCHG = CHG / AVAL * 100
     ) %>%
     group_by(USUBJID, PARAMCD) %>%
@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@ adadas <- qs %>%
     ungroup() %>%
     mutate(
       ANL01FL = case_when(
-        !is.na(AVAL) & !is.na(BASE) & !is.na(CHG) ~ "Y",
+        !is.na(AVAL) & !is.na(BASE) & !is.na(CHG) & PARAMCD %in% c("ACTOT", "ACQ1", "ACQ2", "ACQ3", "ACQ4", "ACQ5", "ACQ6", "ACQ7", "ACQ8", "ACQ9", "ACQ10", "ACQ11", "ACQ12", "ACQ13", "ACQ14") ~ "Y",
         TRUE ~ "N"
       )
     )
